title: ALP silicon-ref -> Zephyr SoC-select Kconfig registry (metadata/registries/silicon-kconfig.json) v1
description: Single source for mapping a silicon ref (`<vendor>:<family>:<part>`) to the Zephyr Kconfig symbol that selects that SoC.  The symbol is COMPUTED, not tabulated: `socSymbolPrefix + ref.upper().replace(':','_')`.  `knownSilicon` is the allowlist of host SoCs that receive a symbol; accelerators (e.g. `deepx:dx:m1`) are intentionally absent and resolve to no symbol.  Replaces the former hardcoded `_SILICON_TO_KCONFIG` dicts in scripts/alp_project.py + scripts/alp_orchestrate.py; coverage (every entry resolves to an existing metadata/socs/ spec) is gated by scripts/validate_metadata.py.
